loop: Ralph Wiggum Loop - Iteration 1 - Full Test Suite Fixed
status: Ralph Wiggum Loop Iteration 1 - COMPLETE - 2328/2328 client tests passing, 73/73 server tests passing
summary: MAJOR BREAKTHROUGH: Achieved 100% test pass rate (2328/2328 client + 73/73 server = 2401 total tests). Root causes fixed: (1) vitest config had 'isolate: false' causing React component tests to leak DOM state between test files - fixed by switching to 'pool: forks' for proper process-level isolation; (2) IntelligentActivityPlanner.test.tsx had async waitFor with side effects (clicking inside waitFor causes infinite toggle loop) - fixed by removing waitFor from click+assert patterns; (3) smartTripSuggester had race condition in getNextAvailableDate when today is Saturday (returned same-day date which was already in the past by milliseconds) - fixed to suggest next Saturday instead; (4) TypeScript compiles cleanly with 0 errors. All 88 client test files and all server tests pass.
next_action: Proceed to security stage - run npm audit and security checks
fixes_this_iteration: Fixed vitest config: changed isolate:false+singleThread:true to pool:'forks' for proper test isolation
Fixed IntelligentActivityPlanner.test.tsx: removed waitFor from click+assert patterns causing infinite loops
Fixed smartTripSuggester.ts: getNextAvailableDate now suggests next Saturday (not today) when today is Saturday
All 2328 client tests now pass (up from 68% to 100%)
